lines: The east gate is chained and sealed with red wax.
Three Hallowfen bell marks sit on the slate. None has an answer beside it.
A medicine wagon waits under canvas with its wheels chalked clean. Beyond the chain, wall families are shut inside until a higher stamp says they still count.

choices.label: Take Aquila's slate to South Measure

effects.log: Aquila's mark breaks the wax. You take the wall road to South Measure.
